[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0001001 2
2 0000110 2
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0010111 4
7 1000010 2

72 27 0000000 a match 0 3 4 5
